name: Drop Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat a griddle or heavy skillet over high heat; grease lightly.
2. Sift the flour, baking soda, and salt into a large bowl.
3. Stir in sugar.
4. Add buttermilk, egg, and melted butter and mix well with a wooden spoon.
5. Drop tablespoonfuls of batter onto the griddle or skillet, spacing scones well apart.
6. Cook for a few minutes or until tops are bubbling and undersides are golden brown; flip over with a wide spatula and cook until brown on the other side.
7. As scones are cooked, wrap them in a cloth towel or napkin to keep them moist and warm while you cook remaining scones.
8. Serve warm with butter. Makes 12 to 15 scones.
Variations: Fruit Drop Scones - Add 1/2 cup raisins (plumped) to the dry ingredients.
